title: Charlotte City Council to Decide on Mayor's Replacement
summary: Charlotte City Council will decide who fills Mayor Vi Lyles' seat within two months. The selection process is expected to be outlined in early June.
charlotte_impact: The selection of a new mayor will significantly impact Charlotte's policies and direction.

title: Charlotte Weather Forecast: Sunshine and Rain
summary: Mother's Day will be sunny, but a cold front is expected to bring showers and thunderstorms on Monday. Sunshine returns by Tuesday.
charlotte_impact: Weather patterns affect daily life and outdoor activities for residents.

title: Two Fatalities in Overnight Charlotte Shooting
summary: An overnight shooting in Charlotte on Rozzelles Ferry Road resulted in the deaths of two people. Police are investigating the incident.
charlotte_impact: Gun violence is a serious concern for public safety in Charlotte.

title: East Charlotte Residents Oppose Proposed Data Center
summary: East Charlotte neighbors are pushing back against a proposed data center, demanding stronger regulations and more public input.
charlotte_impact: Data center developments raise concerns about environmental impact and community involvement.

title: Charlotte Council Discusses Budget, Toll Lanes, and Data Centers
summary: Charlotte City Council will discuss the 2027 city budget, focusing on pay raises for the Charlotte-Mecklenburg Police Department.
charlotte_impact: City budget decisions directly impact public services and community priorities.

title: Shooting in Northwest Charlotte Injures One
summary: One person was shot in northwest Charlotte. The victim was found in Huntersville and transported to the hospital.
charlotte_impact: Shootings raise concerns about safety and security in Charlotte neighborhoods.

title: Fire Cancels Weekend Games at Hickory Stadium
summary: A fire at Hickory's L. P. Frans Stadium caused heavy damage to the visiting team clubhouse, leading to the cancellation of weekend games.
charlotte_impact: Stadium fires disrupt local sports events and cause property damage.

title: Traffic Backed Up on I-85 Due to Collisions
summary: Two separate crashes on I-85 in Charlotte caused traffic delays Saturday afternoon. Emergency crews cleared the scenes.
charlotte_impact: Traffic incidents can disrupt commutes and cause inconvenience for drivers.

title: Two Deadly Crashes in Catawba County
summary: Two fatal car crashes occurred in Catawba County within hours of each other. No charges are expected to be filed.
charlotte_impact: Fatal car crashes highlight the importance of road safety.

title: Deadly Crash on I-85 South in Charlotte
summary: A deadly crash on I-85 South near Little Rock Road in Charlotte is under investigation. Emergency crews responded to the scene.
charlotte_impact: Fatal crashes cause traffic disruptions and raise safety concerns.

title: Competency Hearing Scheduled in Zarutska Murder Case
summary: A competency hearing is scheduled for Decarlos Brown, who is charged with the murder of Iryna Zarutska. He faces multiple charges.
charlotte_impact: Legal proceedings in high-profile cases draw public attention.

title: Woman Raped at Vape Shop in Charlotte, Suspect Arrested
summary: A woman was raped at a vape shop in north Charlotte. A suspect has been arrested in connection with the incident.
charlotte_impact: Sexual assault is a serious crime that impacts community safety.

title: Foxx Urges Rethink of I-77 Toll Expansion
summary: Former Charlotte Mayor Anthony Foxx urges leaders to rethink the I-77 toll lane expansion's impact on Black neighborhoods.
charlotte_impact: Infrastructure projects can disproportionately affect historically marginalized communities.

title: CMS Board to Review Updated Budget Proposal
summary: The CMS board will review an updated budget proposal on Friday after rejecting the superintendent's $2.1 billion proposal on April 28.
charlotte_impact: School board budget decisions impact education funding and resources.

title: Charlotte Water Leak Unfixed for a Year
summary: A Charlotte Water leak near a school went unfixed for almost a year. The city loses 15% of its water annually.
charlotte_impact: Water leaks exacerbate drought conditions and raise concerns about resource management.
